title: monorchis coeloceras
intro: Monorchis coeloceras, also known as the Coeloceras orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Monorchis coeloceras include its use as a diuretic and to treat conditions such as hypertension, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
